benefit.en: Financial assistance of rupees 1.20 lakh in plain areas / 1.30 lakh in hilly areas for construction of a pucca house with basic amenities
benefit.hi: मैदानी क्षेत्रों में 1.20 लाख / पहाड़ी क्षेत्रों में 1.30 लाख रुपये की पक्के घर के निर्माण हेतु सहायता

eligibility_rules_human: Rural household identified in SECC 2011 deprivation parameters as houseless or living in a kuccha house with one or two rooms; not owning a pucca house elsewhere.

offline_steps: Verify SECC inclusion at GP office
Funds released in three installments to bank account
